query:
UPDATE bookings
           SET check_in_date  = $2,
               check_out_date = $3,
               num_guests     = $4,
               room_type_id   = $5,
               notes          = $6,
               admin_notes    = $7,
               total_price    = $8,
               payment_type   = $9,
               payment_amount = $10,
               updated_at     = NOW()
         WHERE id = $1
